name: 11" Fabric Bin 6pk - Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Effortlessly declutter your living space with the help of this 6-Pack of 11-Inch Fabric Bins from Brightroom™. This pack includes six fabric bins, each designed in rectangular silhouettes for stashing anything from everyday utilities, small stationery items, books, craft supplies and more. A wide open-top design allows easy access to the contents, and a side pull-on tab on each bin makes pulling or carrying easy. Best of all, the solid gray hue is sure to complement a variety of decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
